英國英格蘭肯特福爾可斯同
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hamo De Crevequer於大約1224年出生在英國英格蘭肯特時，他的父親Hamo de Crevequer de Crèvecœur Baron of Chatham Baron of Chatham15歲，母親Baroness Alice19歲。他和Joan至少有6個兒子。他去世於1263年在他的家鄉享年40歲。

英国英格兰肯特福爾可斯同
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hamo De Crevequer于大约1224年出生在英国英格兰肯特时，他的父亲Hamo de Crevequer de Crèvecœur Baron of Chatham Baron of Chatham15岁，母亲Baroness Alice19岁。他和Joan至少有6个儿子。他去世于1263年在他的家乡享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hamo
meanings: This is still found as a male baptismal name. It is derived from Hamo, who came over with the Conqueror; perhaps from the Icelandic hamr, a skin found in ulf-hamr, the nickname of a mythological king, which Cleasby translates 'wolf-skin.'

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Hamo De Crevequer was born about 1224, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hamo de Crevequer de Crèvecœur Baron of Chatham Baron of Chatham, was 15 and his mother, Baroness Alice, was 19. He had at least 6 sons with Joan. He died in 1263, in his hometown, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hamo De Crevequer est né environ 1224, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hamo de Crevequer de Crèvecœur Baron of Chatham Baron of Chatham, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Baroness Alice, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Joan. Il est décédé en 1263, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hamo De Crevequer um 1224 in Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hamo de Crevequer de Crèvecœur Baron of Chatham Baron of Chatham 15 und seine Mutter Baroness Alice 19. Er hatte mit Joan mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1263 im Alter von 40 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hamo De Crevequer è nato il circa 1224 nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hamo de Crevequer de Crèvecœur Baron of Chatham Baron of Chatham, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Baroness Alice, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli con Joan. Morì nel 1263, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hamo De Crevequerが約1224年にイギリスイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Hamo de Crevequer de Crèvecœur Baron of Chatham Baron of Chathamは15歳，母Baroness Aliceは19歳であった。彼はJoanとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼は1263年に故郷で40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hamo De Crevequer(이)가 대략 1224년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hamo de Crevequer de Crèvecœur Baron of Chatham Baron of Chatham(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Alice(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Joan(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1263년 그의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hamo De Crevequer nasceu aproximadamente 1224, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hamo de Crevequer de Crèvecœur Baron of Chatham Baron of Chatham, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Alice, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Joan. Ele faleceu em 1263, em sua cidade natal, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hamo De Crevequer родился около 1224 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hamo de Crevequer de Crèvecœur Baron of Chatham Baron of Chatham было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Alice, 19. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Joan. Он умер в 1263 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hamo De Crevequer nació aproximadamente 1224, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hamo de Crevequer de Crèvecœur Baron of Chatham Baron of Chatham, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Baroness Alice, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Joan. Murió en 1263, en su pueblo, a la edad de 40 años.
